flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Indiana Institute of Technology vs the 2018–2022 baseline (31.4% vs 37.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Indiana Institute of Technology are 59% above 6-year earnings ($29.7k → $47.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Indiana Institute of Technology rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (25.6% → 34.8%).
